{{Quote|It's good here. Green. Life. This is where we shall begin. The Village of Aurilia. The dream becomes reality…|Rohak|<ref name="SonyCite-Friday Feature – Village of Aurilia">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Friday%20Feature%20Village%20of%20Aurilia|text=Friday Feature – Village of Aurilia}}</ref>}}
'''Aurilia''' was a mysterious village on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], founded by a small group of like-minded [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] refugees. In about [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], it fell under attack from the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Mellichae]] and his [[Sith Shadows]]. They were eventually defeated with the help of an unidentified [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], and Aurilia recovered and grew into a thriving township.

==History==
[[File:Villageofaurillia.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The village of Aurilia]]
Aurilia was originally founded by a small group of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] misfits as a place to practice [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] away from the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The village was a simple, rustic place consisting of huts, with a stone wall around the perimeter. To protect themselves, the villagers used their abilities to create a dense mist that surrounded the village. This mist could only be penetrated by Force-sensitives.

In around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Mellichae]] and his [[Sith Shadows]] began attacking the village. Mellichae believed that killing or capturing the village's Force-sensitive residents would be a good way for him to regain the trust of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and maybe even earn a place at his side. The villagers worked hard to prepare the village for the attack, but it sustained significant damage. Eventually, with the help of a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]], Mellichae was defeated and imprisoned in the [[Aurilia prison]].

Afterwards, the village retreated into the mist and cut itself off from the rest of the galaxy. The mist eventually cleared to reveal a new Aurilia, one that had been rebuilt into a much larger township. [[Pilot/Legends|Pilots]] and spacers from across the galaxy flocked to the new Aurilia to purchase rare items from the traders there and to take on dangerous and exciting quests from the [[Adventurers' Guildhall]].

==Behind the scenes==
Aurilia was introduced into ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' on [[August 31]], [[2004]], roughly one year after the product's initial release. It was included as part of the [[W:c:swg:Publish 10 Notes for 31 August 04|Publish 10]], "The Jedi Trials." It was a place where players controlling [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] characters would perform tasks in order to [[W:c:swg:Jedi (pre-NGE)|become]] a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].

Aurilia was removed from the game when the ''New Game Enhancements'' were introduced in late [[2005]]. However, it returned to the game in [[W:c:swg:Chapter 7 Notes for Nov 1 2007|Chapter 7]] (November [[2007]]) as a township rather than a village. ''Star Wars Galaxies'' was later shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
